title: randalia depressa
side_effects: Randalia depressa can have side effects if used improperly, such as dizziness and nausea, particularly if ingested in large quantities. Prolonged exposure to its extracts can also lead to skin irritation, including redness and itching. In rare cases, improper use of the plant can cause cardiovascular issues, including rapid heartbeat and increased blood pressure. Furthermore, using Randalia depressa without proper guidance can also result in interactions with other medications, exacerbating underlying health conditions.
